zh.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare是Henry De La Mare和De La Mare的兒子，於1210年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞艾普頌。他於1246年與Florence de Akeni在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年8月在英國艾可布拉德維爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare是Henry De La Mare和De La Mare的儿子，于1210年出生在英国英格兰素瑞艾普頌。他于1246年与Florence de Akeni在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1270年8月在英国艾可布拉德維爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.
English: variant of   Mear  .

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: Mear, a field; also from mear or mearh, a horse
Anglo-Saxon: Mere, lake, pool, sea

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

variants.name: Mathew
meanings: Variant spelling of   Matthew .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare was born in 1210, in Epsom, Surrey, England, United Kingdom as the son of Henry De La Mare and De La Mare. He married Florence de Akeni in 1246, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in August 1270, in Bradwell, Essex, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare est né en 1210, à Epsom, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Henry De La Mare et De La Mare. Il a épousé Florence de Akeni en 1246, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en août 1270, à Bradwell, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare wurde 1210 in Epsom, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Henry De La Mare und De La Mare geboren. Er hat 1246 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Florence de Akeni geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im August 1270 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Bradwell, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare è nato il nel 1210 nel Epsom, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Henry De La Mare e De La Mare. Lui sposato Florence de Akeni nel 1246, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1270, nel Bradwell, Essex, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mareは1210年にイギリスイギリススリーエプソムでHenry De La MareとDe La Mareの息子として生まれた。1246年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでFlorence de Akeniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年8月にイギリスエセックスブラドウエルで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare(은)는 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 프소에서 Henry De La Mare(와)과 De La Mare의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Florence de Akeni(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 8월 영국 에세스 브라드웰에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare nasceu em 1210, em Epsom, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Henry De La Mare e De La Mare. Ele casou-se com Florence de Akeni em 1246, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare родился в 1210 г. в местности эпсом, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Henry De La Mare и De La Mare. Он женился на женщине по имени Florence de Akeni в 1246 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер август 1270 г. в местности брадвелл, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Matthew de la Mare nació en 1210, en Epsom, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Henry De La Mare y De La Mare. Murió en agosto de 1270, en Bradwell, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
